release_notes:
MBT POS 3.0.3 production gate: product returns (partial restock + refund sale), suppliers + receive stock, approvals escalate, durable hold, Focus mode, Ctrl+K search, settings/receipt hardening, and expanded production test gates.

checksum_note: Publish SHA-256 in GitHub release notes as [checksum_sha256: <hex>] and/or upload MBT_POS_Setup.exe.sha256 sidecar. Required for unattended install.
